title: Friends and Lovers
writer: Maurice Dekobra, Wallace Smith, Jane Murfin
actors: Adolphe Menjou, Lili Damita, Laurence Olivier
plot: British Army Captain Geoff Roberts carries on an affair with Alva, the wife of the cruel Victor Sangrito. Sangrito, however, is well aware of the affair, as he uses his beautiful wife to lure men into romance with her, then blackm...
